text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

ACtually, close this ticket. This is a user question, not a Problem 
Report (PR). Please head to freebsd-arch 
(http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo) and/or freebsd-net to ask 
this question there. If it is a good idea people will implement this.
